name.full: A365 Orchestrator — M365 Agents SDK Reference

description.short: Routes Teams conversations to specialist Copilot Studio agents.
description.full: A reference implementation of the M365 Agents SDK pattern. The A365 Orchestrator classifies each user message and forwards it to the appropriate specialist agent: IT Help Desk, Calendar Manager, or Knowledge Base — all powered by Copilot Studio.

commands.title: help
commands.description: Show what the orchestrator can do.

commands.title: reset password
commands.description: Start a password reset with IT Help Desk.

commands.title: schedule meeting
commands.description: Schedule a meeting with the Calendar Manager.

commands.title: search
commands.description: Search the Knowledge Base for guides and policies.

disclaimer.text: This is a custom AI agent and may not always be accurate.
